headline: Workplace discrimination complaints exceed 2,800 in 2024
context: The Industrial Relations Department and Human Resources Ministry received over 2,800 workplace discrimination complaints in 2024.

cards.big: 2,800 workplace discrimination complaints filed in 2024 without specific law
cards.sub: Malaysia has no comprehensive anti-discrimination legislation

cards.big: Employment Act 1955 lacks explicit anti-discrimination provisions beyond gender
cards.sub: Race, religion, disability, and age discrimination not specifically prohibited

cards.big: Article 8 constitutional equality provision not directly enforceable in employment
cards.sub: ILO Convention 111 on employment discrimination ratified but not domesticated

cards.big: 47% of complaints involved racial or religious discrimination in hiring
cards.sub: Chinese and Indian Malaysians reported 3x higher job application rejection rates

cards.big: 2,800 complaints with no anti-discrimination law means victims have no remedy
Equality Act proposed by human rights coalition remains in drafting since 2021
